shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Diffuse floating overlay shadow under dropdowns and modals.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Exponential deceleration curve for smooth page actions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #030213; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1c1b2d; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #030213; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: KPI Card
components.html:
Tổng học viên

1,240

Học viên đăng ký
components.css: .ds-kpi-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-radius: 10px; padding: 20px; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-kpi-card:hover { border-color: rgba(3,2,19,0.3); } .ds-kpi-label { font-size: 11px; color: #717182; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 500; } .ds-kpi-val { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #030213; margin: 8px 0 2px 0; } .ds-kpi-sub { font-size: 11px; color: #717182; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: The FEdu Design System is a highly structured, professional, and task-focused visual workspace designed for educational administrators, teachers, and students.

rules.name: The 10% Accent Rule
rules.body: Accent colors and high-contrast indicators must occupy no more than 10% of any screen surface.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All main dashboard sections and stats cards are flat at rest.

dos: Do use border border-border/60 to divide sections.
Do keep text sizes fixed and rely on grid wrappers for responsive scaling.
donts: Don't use decorative gradients behind headers.
Don't use container rounding values larger than 12px.
Don't combine card borders with heavy shadows.
